tldr: Two pairs of near-identical ads are running in parallel — the 'Be unapologetically you' duplicate and the LIGHTSUM duplicate — which means half your spend is reinforcing the same creative signal to Meta. Expect CPM lift within 7–10 days as frequency compounds on the duplicated bodies.

benchmark.context: Fashion/jewelry DTC brands typically see ~22 days before fatigue spikes CPMs. OHTNYC is running below median because two of four primary ads share identical body copy, accelerating audience burnout.

ads.headline: Layered to perfection
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Body copy is duplicated verbatim with Ad #3 — auction is competing against itself
Headline 'Layered to perfection' is generic, no product specificity or hook tension
Same LP as Ad #3 (transparent-heart-charm-necklace) compounds creative overlap

ads.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ads.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
drivers: Identical body to Ad #2 — Meta is likely throttling delivery on the weaker variant
'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' framing is utilitarian and clashes with the bold/genderless brand DNA
Same LP as Ad #2 means clicks cannibalize without product differentiation

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Strong collab signal (LIGHTSUM x CUBE) gives the ad scarcity and cultural relevance
'Main character era' angle taps a proven Gen-Z hook
Headline copy is identical to Ad #5 — duplicate risk pulling score down

ads.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ads.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era. Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage. ✧˖°⋆｡˚
drivers: Identical creative to Ad #4 except LP (supernova-necklace vs cube-dice-necklace)
Limited drop urgency softens with prolonged run — scarcity erodes after ~2 weeks
No differentiation in headline tells Meta these are interchangeable

ad_to_scale.headline: From CUBE to Cosmos — The OHT x LIGHTSUM Drop
ad_to_scale.body: ₊˚⊹♡ OHT x CUBE LIGHTSUM ♡⊹˚₊ From CUBE to cosmos — a collection inspired by bold legacies and bright energy. Built for the main character era.
ad_to_scale.why: The LIGHTSUM collab is the only ad with a built-in cultural hook and scarcity narrative ('Limited drop, made to shine on and off stage'). The supernova-necklace LP is a hero SKU within the drop, giving more upside than the cube-dice variant. Push budget here while the K-pop fandom signal is fresh — collab windows fatigue fast.

ad_to_kill.headline: For Your Weekly Jewelry Rotation
ad_to_kill.body: Be unapologetically you. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece is meticulously designed to empower you to express your unique style fearlessly.
ad_to_kill.why: Body copy is a verbatim duplicate of Ad #2 and the 'Weekly Jewelry Rotation' headline reads like a generic e-com prompt — it fights OHTNYC's bold, genderless positioning. Killing it consolidates spend onto Ad #2 and frees budget for replacement concepts that don't cannibalize the same LP.

concepts.hook: Jewelry shouldn't have a gender. Here's why.
concepts.primary_text: OHTNYC was built to break the rule that says a chain belongs to him and a charm belongs to her. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ Every piece — from the Transparent Heart Charm to the Cube Dice Necklace — is designed for whoever wants to wear it. Genderless by design. Bold by default. Tap in and shop the pieces rewriting the rules from NYC.
concepts.visual_direction: Founder talking head intercut with close-ups of the same necklace styled on three different people across genders/skin tones. NYC street b-roll.
concepts.fills_gap: No founder/brand-story content currently in rotation — all 4 ads are product-led.

concepts.hook: How many OHT chains is too many?
concepts.primary_text: Ans: there's no such thing. ♡⊹˚₊ Watch one OHT muse stack the Transparent Heart Charm with the Supernova and the Cube Dice — three drops, one neckline, zero rules. Layered to perfection isn't a tagline, it's a dare. Build your stack.
concepts.visual_direction: Fast-cut UGC of a creator layering 3+ OHT necklaces on camera, mirror angle, hands-in-frame. Text overlay counts each piece added.
concepts.fills_gap: Zero UGC or social-proof format in the current set — all ads are studio/brand-voice.

concepts.primary_text: From CUBE to cosmos — and almost gone. ✧˖°⋆｡˚ The OHT x LIGHTSUM collab was built for the main character era and the main characters showed up. Supernova, Cube Dice, and the rest of the drop are moving fast. Limited run, no restock. Lock yours before the cosmos closes.
concepts.visual_direction: 4-frame carousel: each frame shows a LIGHTSUM SKU with a 'X% claimed' progress bar overlay. Final frame: 'Shop the drop.'
concepts.fills_gap: Current LIGHTSUM ads (#4, #5) lack visible scarcity proof — this adds tangible urgency to extend the collab's runway.

unlocks: Cut duplicate-body waste — recover spend currently fighting itself in the auction
Add format diversity (UGC + founder) so Meta has signal beyond static product shots
Extend the LIGHTSUM collab window with a scarcity creative before the cultural moment cools
Push days-until-fatigue from 11 toward the 22-day category median within 2 weeks

next_step.urgency: Ad #3 hits danger zone in 6 days — Ad #2 follows in 9.
next_step.headline: 30 min to lock the replacement slate
next_step.body: Let's map which of the 3 concepts ships first and rebuild the testing structure so you stop running duplicate bodies. I'll bring a shoot-ready brief for the winner.

method_note: Scores are inferred from public Meta Ad Library text signals (duplication, hook specificity, format diversity, LP overlap) — not from your account's CPM/CTR data.
